# Design Spec — DocTalk

**Generated by:** ui-ux-designer (ui-ux-pro-max + taste-skill pipeline)
**Date:** 2026-04-15
**Dials:** DESIGN_VARIANCE: 8 | MOTION_INTENSITY: 6 | VISUAL_DENSITY: 4

---

## 1. Color Palette

Inherited from ui-ux-pro-max Flat Design system. Single accent color, saturation well under 80%. No AI purple. No warm/cool gray mixing — all values from the Slate scale.

| Role | Token | Hex | Usage |
|------|-------|-----|-------|
| Background | `--color-bg` | #F8FAFC | Page background, full viewport fill |
| Surface | `--color-surface` | #FFFFFF | Cards, drop zone, chat bubbles (AI side), input bar |
| Surface Alt | `--color-surface-alt` | #F1F2F3 | User message bubbles, starter chips background, hover feedback on flat elements |
| Primary | `--color-primary` | #1E293B | Primary text, headings, document name in header |
| Secondary | `--color-secondary` | #334155 | Body text, AI message text, secondary labels |
| Tertiary | `--color-tertiary` | #64748B | Timestamps, helper text, placeholder text, muted labels |
| Accent | `--color-accent` | #2563EB | CTA buttons, active focus rings, links, upload progress indicator |
| Accent Hover | `--color-accent-hover` | #1D4ED8 | Hover state for accent elements (darken, no glow) |
| Border | `--color-border` | #E4E5E7 | Drop zone border, input borders, divider lines, card outlines |
| Border Active | `--color-border-active` | #2563EB | Drop zone on drag-over, focused input border |
| Destructive | `--color-destructive` | #DC2626 | Error text, error border on invalid file |
| Destructive BG | `--color-destructive-bg` | #FEF2F2 | Error message background container |
| Ring | `--color-ring` | #1E293B | Focus ring on keyboard navigation (non-accent elements) |

**Rules enforced:**
- Background is Slate-50 (#F8FAFC), all grays stay in the Slate family — no warm gray contamination
- Accent #2563EB has saturation ~74%, passing the < 80% constraint
- No pure black anywhere — darkest value is #0F172A (Slate-900) used sparingly
- No neon glows, no outer box-shadow glows — all feedback via border color shift or opacity change

---

## 2. Typography

**Primary Family:** Geist (source: google, available via `next/font/google` as `"Geist"`)
**Mono Family:** Geist Mono (source: google, available via `next/font/google` as `"Geist_Mono"`)

Inter is BANNED. Serif fonts are BANNED (software UI context).

| Level | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing | Usage |
|-------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|-------|
| Display | 36px / 2.25rem | 700 | 1.1 | -0.025em | Upload page headline |
| H1 | 28px / 1.75rem | 700 | 1.2 | -0.02em | Not used in current screens |
| H2 | 22px / 1.375rem | 600 | 1.3 | -0.015em | Chat header document name |
| H3 | 18px / 1.125rem | 600 | 1.4 | -0.01em | Section labels, empty state title |
| Body | 16px / 1rem | 400 | 1.65 | 0 | Chat messages (user and AI), body text |
| Body Small | 14px / 0.875rem | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Starter chip text, file info, helper text |
| Caption | 12px / 0.75rem | 500 | 1.4 | 0.02em | Timestamps, error messages, file size label |
| Label | 14px / 0.875rem | 500 | 1.4 | 0.01em | Button labels, input labels |
| Mono | 14px / 0.875rem | 400 | 1.5 | 0 | Code snippets inside AI responses (Geist Mono) |

**Hierarchy note:** At DESIGN_VARIANCE 8, the display heading on the upload page should NOT be centered. It sits left-aligned within the drop zone region, creating asymmetric weight on the page.

---

## 3. Spacing Scale

Base unit: 4px (0.25rem). The scale follows a 4px grid.

| Token | px | rem | Usage examples |
|-------|----|-----|---------------|
| `--space-1` | 4 | 0.25 | Inline icon gap, tight element pairs |
| `--space-2` | 8 | 0.5 | Gap between icon and label, input internal padding vertical |
| `--space-3` | 12 | 0.75 | Gap between caption lines, chip internal padding |
| `--space-4` | 16 | 1.0 | Input horizontal padding, gap between form fields |
| `--space-5` | 20 | 1.25 | Card internal padding (compact) |
| `--space-6` | 24 | 1.5 | Section gaps (mobile), gap between messages in chat |
| `--space-8` | 32 | 2.0 | Container padding (mobile), drop zone internal padding |
| `--space-10` | 40 | 2.5 | Section gaps (desktop) |
| `--space-12` | 48 | 3.0 | Drop zone internal padding (desktop) |
| `--space-16` | 64 | 4.0 | Large section breathing room |
| `--space-20` | 80 | 5.0 | Upload page vertical centering offset |

**Key spacing decisions (VISUAL_DENSITY 4 — "Daily App" leaning airy):**
- Chat message gap: `--space-6` (24px) — generous but not art-gallery
- Drop zone padding: `--space-12` (48px) on desktop, `--space-8` (32px) on mobile
- Input bar internal padding: `--space-2` vertical, `--space-4` horizontal
- Page container padding: `--space-8` horizontal on mobile, `--space-10` on desktop

**Border Radius Scale:**

| Token | Value | Usage |
|-------|-------|-------|
| `--radius-sm` | 6px | Chips, small buttons, input fields |
| `--radius-md` | 10px | Chat bubbles, drop zone, cards |
| `--radius-lg` | 16px | Modal containers (if any) |
| `--radius-full` | 9999px | Avatar circles, pill buttons |

---

## 4. Component Tree

### Upload Page (`/`)

```
UploadPage
  PageContainer (max-width, centered, full viewport height)
    UploadZone (the primary interaction region)
      DropArea
        DropIcon (Phosphor: UploadSimple, weight "light", 48px)
        Headline (Display: left-aligned, "Talk to your documents")
        Subtext (Body Small: "Drop a PDF here or browse your files")
        FilePicker (hidden input[type=file], accept=.pdf)
      FileInfo (visible after selection)
        FileIcon (Phosphor: FilePdf, weight "duotone", 20px)
        FileName (Body Small, truncated with ellipsis, max-width 280px)
        FileSize (Caption, tertiary color)
        RemoveButton (Phosphor: X, 16px, tertiary, hover destructive)
      UploadButton
        Label ("Upload and start chatting")
        LoadingSpinner (visible during upload, replaces label)
      ErrorMessage (visible on error)
        ErrorIcon (Phosphor: Warning, weight "fill", 16px, destructive)
        ErrorText (Caption, destructive color)
```

**UploadZone design notes:**
- Drop zone has a 1px dashed border (--color-border), transitions to 2px solid (--color-border-active) on drag-over
- Background shifts from transparent to accent at 4% opacity on drag-over
- The zone is NOT centered on the page at DESIGN_VARIANCE 8 — it sits in a 60/40 split layout where the zone occupies the left 60% and the right 40% is empty negative space (desktop only; collapses to full-width on mobile)
- Headline is left-aligned within the zone, not centered

### Chat Page (`/chat`)

```
ChatPage
  ChatContainer (full viewport, flex column)
    ChatHeader (fixed top, surface background, bottom border)
      BackLink (Phosphor: ArrowLeft, 20px, "Upload new")
      DocInfo
        DocIcon (Phosphor: FilePdf, weight "duotone", 20px)
        DocName (H2 level, truncated)
    MessageArea (flex-grow, scrollable, padding bottom for input bar clearance)
      EmptyState (visible when messages.length === 0)
        EmptyIcon (Phosphor: ChatTeardrop, weight "light", 40px, tertiary)
        EmptyTitle (H3: "Ask anything about this document")
        EmptySubtext (Body Small, tertiary)
        StarterChips (horizontal wrap layout)
          Chip ("Summarize this document")
          Chip ("What are the key points?")
          Chip ("Extract all dates and deadlines")
      MessageList (visible when messages.length > 0)
        Message (repeated)
          UserMessage (right-aligned, surface-alt bg, primary text)
            MessageText (Body)
          AIMessage (left-aligned, surface bg, secondary text, 1px border)
            MessageText (Body, supports inline Mono for code)
            StreamingCursor (blinking block, visible during streaming)
    InputBar (fixed bottom, surface background, top border)
      InputField (text input, auto-growing textarea behavior, placeholder "Ask a question...")
      SendButton (Phosphor: PaperPlaneTilt, weight "fill", 20px, accent bg, on-primary text)
        DisabledState (opacity 40%, cursor not-allowed during streaming)
```

**Component token mapping:**

| Component | Background | Text | Border | Radius |
|-----------|-----------|------|--------|--------|
| UploadZone (default) | transparent | -- | border (dashed) | radius-md |
| UploadZone (drag-over) | accent/4% | -- | border-active (solid) | radius-md |
| UploadButton | accent | on-primary (#FFF) | none | radius-sm |
| ChatHeader | surface | primary | border (bottom) | none |
| UserMessage | surface-alt | primary | none | radius-md |
| AIMessage | surface | secondary | border | radius-md |
| StarterChip | surface-alt | secondary | border | radius-full |
| InputField | surface | primary | border | radius-sm |
| SendButton | accent | on-primary | none | radius-sm |
| ErrorMessage | destructive-bg | destructive | none | radius-sm |

---

## 5. Layout

### Grid Structure

**Upload Page (desktop):**
- Asymmetric two-column grid: `grid-template-columns: 3fr 2fr`
- Drop zone occupies the left column
- Right column is intentional negative space (no content) — anti-center bias at DESIGN_VARIANCE 8
- Vertical centering via `min-h-[100dvh]` with grid `place-items: center` on the left column
- Container max-width: 1200px, centered with auto margins

**Upload Page (mobile):**
- Single column, full width
- Drop zone takes full width with `--space-8` horizontal padding
- Vertically centered in viewport

**Chat Page (all sizes):**
- Single column, no grid needed
- Full viewport height flex column: header (auto) + messages (flex-grow) + input bar (auto)
- Message area max-width: 768px, centered within the scrollable area
- Messages have left/right alignment but both constrained within the 768px container

### Breakpoints

| Name | Min Width | Layout Changes |
|------|-----------|---------------|
| Mobile | 0px | Single column everywhere. Drop zone full-width. Messages full-width. Input bar full-width. |
| Tablet | 768px | Upload page gains the 3fr/2fr split. Chat messages gain max-width constraint. |
| Desktop | 1024px | Container max-width activates (1200px for upload, 768px for chat). Spacing scale increases. |

### Container

- Upload page container: max-width 1200px, padding `--space-8` (mobile) / `--space-10` (desktop)
- Chat page container: full-width viewport, messages capped at 768px centered
- All full-height sections use `min-h-[100dvh]`, never `h-screen`
- Grid over flex-math: all column layouts use CSS Grid, not flex percentage calculations

---

## 6. Interaction Patterns

**Active dials:** MOTION_INTENSITY 6 (Fluid CSS range), DESIGN_VARIANCE 8

### Transitions (global)

| Property | Duration | Easing | Notes |
|----------|----------|--------|-------|
| background-color | 150ms | ease | Drop zone hover/drag feedback |
| border-color | 150ms | ease | Input focus, drop zone drag-over |
| opacity | 200ms | ease | Button disabled/enabled, fade-in elements |
| transform | 200ms | cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) | Scale feedback on button press |
| color | 150ms | ease | Link/icon hover color shifts |

### Hover States

| Element | Hover Effect |
|---------|-------------|
| UploadButton | Background shifts from accent to accent-hover. No glow. |
| SendButton | Background shifts from accent to accent-hover. |
| StarterChip | Border color shifts to accent. Background shifts to surface. |
| BackLink | Text color shifts from tertiary to primary. |
| RemoveButton | Icon color shifts from tertiary to destructive. |

### Active/Pressed States

| Element | Active Effect |
|---------|-------------|
| UploadButton | `scale(0.98)` — tactile push feedback |
| SendButton | `scale(0.97)` — slightly more aggressive for small target |
| StarterChip | `scale(0.98)` + background shifts to accent at 8% opacity |

### Focus States

- All interactive elements receive a 2px focus ring using `--color-ring` with 2px offset
- Input fields: border-color transitions to `--color-border-active` on focus, no ring (border IS the indicator)
- Buttons: 2px ring with `--color-accent` and 2px offset from border

### Drop Zone Drag Interaction

- **Default:** 1px dashed border (--color-border), transparent background
- **Drag over (file hovering):** Border becomes 2px solid (--color-border-active), background becomes accent at 4% opacity, DropIcon scales to 1.05 with spring-like easing
- **Drag leave:** Reverts with 200ms ease transition
- **Invalid file dragged:** Border becomes destructive color, icon shakes (subtle 2px horizontal oscillation, 300ms, 3 cycles)

### Streaming Animation

- **Cursor:** A block cursor (8px wide, 18px tall, accent color) blinks with `opacity` animation: 1 to 0.2, 800ms duration, infinite, ease-in-out
- **Token arrival:** Each token fades in with 50ms opacity transition from 0 to 1 — creates a smooth text "materializing" effect without heavy animation overhead
- **Auto-scroll:** Smooth scroll behavior (`scroll-behavior: smooth`) on the message container; scrolls to bottom on each new token only if user is already near bottom (within 100px of scroll end)
- **Completion:** Cursor fades out (200ms opacity to 0), final message settles

### Loading States

- **Upload in progress:** Button label replaced by a small horizontal loading bar (accent color, 3px height, indeterminate left-to-right sweep). No circular spinner.
- **Chat waiting for first token:** Three-dot pulse animation in the AI message bubble area (dots are 6px circles in tertiary color, staggered scale animation, 600ms per cycle)

### Empty States

- Chat empty state uses `--color-tertiary` for icon and subtext to feel muted and inviting
- Starter chips have a subtle entrance animation: stagger fade-in (opacity 0 to 1 + translateY 8px to 0), 100ms delay between each chip, 300ms duration each

### Error States

- Inline error below the drop zone: destructive-bg background, destructive text, ErrorIcon left of text
- Error fades in (opacity 0 to 1, 200ms) and auto-dismisses after 8 seconds (fade out 300ms)
- During error display, drop zone border becomes destructive color

---

## 7. Image Strategy (Icon-Only)

This application has no photographic images. All visual elements are iconographic.

**Icon Library:** `@phosphor-icons/react`
**Reason:** Phosphor provides multiple weights (thin, light, regular, bold, fill, duotone) enabling visual hierarchy through weight variation without changing icon families.

### Icon Inventory

| Context | Icon Name | Weight | Size | Color Token |
|---------|-----------|--------|------|-------------|
| Drop zone (default) | UploadSimple | light | 48px | tertiary |
| Drop zone (drag-over) | UploadSimple | regular | 48px | accent |
| File selected | FilePdf | duotone | 20px | destructive (the PDF red) |
| Remove file | X | regular | 16px | tertiary (hover: destructive) |
| Error indicator | Warning | fill | 16px | destructive |
| Chat header doc icon | FilePdf | duotone | 20px | destructive |
| Back/Upload new | ArrowLeft | regular | 20px | tertiary (hover: primary) |
| Empty state icon | ChatTeardrop | light | 40px | tertiary |
| Send button | PaperPlaneTilt | fill | 20px | on-primary (#FFF) |
| Send button (disabled) | PaperPlaneTilt | light | 20px | on-primary at 40% opacity |

**Icon rules:**
- All icons in the same context share a single weight — never mix regular and bold side by side
- The "light" weight is reserved for large decorative icons (40px+)
- The "fill" weight is reserved for actionable small icons (buttons)
- The "duotone" weight signals file-type recognition (PDF icon gets its natural red-ish hue via destructive token)
- No custom SVGs — Phosphor covers all needs for this scope
- No emoji anywhere

### `next/image` Configuration

Not applicable — no raster images. No `remotePatterns` configuration needed. If future iterations add user avatars or document thumbnails, revisit this section.

---

## 8. Scrollbar

The chat message area is the only scrollable region. The scrollbar should feel invisible until hovered.

| Property | Value | Notes |
|----------|-------|-------|
| Track color | transparent | Blends with background |
| Track color (hover) | `--color-bg` (#F8FAFC) | Subtle track appears on hover |
| Thumb color | `--color-border` (#E4E5E7) | Neutral, disappears into the UI |
| Thumb color (hover) | `--color-tertiary` (#64748B) | Darker on direct hover for grab affordance |
| Width | 6px | Thin — matches VISUAL_DENSITY 4 (airy, minimal) |
| Border radius | 9999px (pill) | Rounded ends, consistent with radius language |

**Cross-browser implementation notes:**
- Use `scrollbar-width: thin` and `scrollbar-color` for Firefox
- Use `::-webkit-scrollbar`, `::-webkit-scrollbar-track`, `::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb` for Chromium/Safari
- Thumb should only appear on scroll or container hover (use opacity transition on the thumb, 200ms)
- The upload page has no scrollable content (single viewport) — scrollbar styling only applies to the chat message area

---

## Design Dial Rationale

**DESIGN_VARIANCE 8 (Asymmetric):**
- Upload page uses asymmetric 3fr/2fr grid with intentional empty space on the right — breaks the centered-hero AI cliche
- Headline is left-aligned within its zone, not centered
- Chat layout is conventional single-column (functional necessity for chat UX overrides variance here)

**MOTION_INTENSITY 6 (Fluid CSS):**
- All transitions use `cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1)` for transform, standard `ease` for color/opacity
- Streaming cursor uses CSS animation (no Framer Motion needed — this is simple enough for CSS)
- Stagger entrance on starter chips adds polish without heavy animation libraries
- No scroll-triggered animations, no parallax — the product is a utility tool, not a marketing page

**VISUAL_DENSITY 4 (Daily App, leaning airy):**
- Generous spacing between chat messages (24px)
- Drop zone has 48px internal padding on desktop
- Single-purpose screens with minimal UI chrome
- No sidebar, no navigation menu, no dashboard density — two focused screens only
